info.title: In Atelier Public API
info.summary: Unified, versioned, and documented public API surface grouped into coherent /v1 families.
info.description: Unified public gateway contract for the In Atelier BaaS platform. The surface is exposed through APISIX, versioned under /v1, pinned with X-API-Version, and organized into stable families for platform, tenants, workspaces, authorization, data, events, functions, storage, metrics, and realtime routes.

get.summary: Return control-plane health status
Fetch one canonical platform user entity under the platform family

400.description: The request is malformed or contextually inconsistent.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but not authorized for this scope.

404.description: The requested entity was not found.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream control-plane or adapter response.

bearerAuth.description: Keycloak-issued access token carrying platform, tenant, and workspace authorization bindings.

XApiVersion.name: X-API-Version
XApiVersion.description: Pinned additive contract version for the v1 public API release published with gateway QoS and hardening support.

XCorrelationId.name: X-Correlation-Id
XCorrelationId.description: Stable request correlation identifier reused by downstream authorization, orchestration, audit flows, and backfilled by the gateway when recovery requires it.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Stable idempotency token for safe retries of POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE operations routed through the gateway. Replays are retained for 24h and surfaced through X-Idempotency-Replayed.

PageSize.name: page[size]
PageSize.description: Maximum number of items to return for list and catalog routes.

PageAfter.name: page[after]
PageAfter.description: Opaque cursor for the next page window.

Sort.name: sort
Sort.description: Stable sort field for catalog and collection routes.

Search.name: search
Search.description: Free-text search across human-facing route metadata.

FilterFamily.name: family
FilterFamily.description: Filter the route catalog by public API family.

FilterScope.name: scope
FilterScope.description: Filter the route catalog by control scope.

FilterResourceType.name: resourceType
FilterResourceType.description: Filter the route catalog by canonical resource type.

FilterMethod.name: method
FilterMethod.description: Filter the route catalog by HTTP method.

FilterAudience.name: audience
FilterAudience.description: Filter the route catalog by intended consumer audience.

FilterVisibility.name: visibility
FilterVisibility.description: Filter the route catalog by visibility mode.

action.description: Canonical action identifier such as workspace.update or bucket.write.

EntityMetadata.description: Non-secret additive metadata for canonical entities.

tenantId.description: Stable tenant identifier for the parent tenant that will own the workspace.
